tasks.dev: deno task -c ../../deno.json prepare && deno task verify:contracts && vite dev
tasks.build: deno task -c ../../deno.json prepare && deno task verify:contracts && vite build
tasks.check: deno task -c ../../deno.json prepare && deno task verify:contracts && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.check.json
